## Post Checklist

- [ ] My post lives under `posts/<language>/<year>/<slug>/index.md`.
- [ ] Images are local files next to the post, not remote URLs.
- [ ] Every image has meaningful alt text.
- [ ] My author profile exists under `authors/<slug>.yml`.
- [ ] I ran `powerforge-web contributions validate --root .`.

## Notes For Reviewers

Add anything maintainers should know before importing this post.
